reference: I was pulling heavy furniture yesterday. This morning, my lower abdomen was hurting. I pressed down; I think it was my right ovary. I have had this before from moving furniture. I had been feeling good, but now I have started to bloat. Could it be a pulled muscle?
text: こんなに楽しい遊び、まだ他にありますかね。赤ちゃんは何でも迷うのだろうか。私たちにとって、見えているものが、赤ちゃんにとっては見えていないのでしょうか。
